title: MGN 554 (M+F) Amendment 2 – Procedure for becoming a UK approved body
body: "   Notice to all Conformity Assessment Bodies seeking designation as a UK Approved Body   This Marine Guidance Note replaces MGN 554 Amendment 1.    This Note should be read in conjunction with the Merchant Shipping (Marine Equipment) Regulations 2025 and MSN 1874 (M+F). "
